name: Ursula von der Leyen
role: President, European Commission (2019–present)
quote: Europe will succeed if we stand together. And we will stand together.

name: António Costa
role: President, European Council (2024–present)
quote: Europe must be a strategic actor in a world that is rapidly changing.

name: Roberta Metsola
role: President, European Parliament (2022–present)
quote: The European Parliament is the voice of the citizens of Europe, and we must ensure that voice is heard.

name: Mario Draghi
role: Former ECB President; Author of EU Competitiveness Report (2024)
quote: Whatever it takes to preserve the euro — and believe me, it will be enough.

name: Jean Monnet
role: Founding Father; first High Authority President, ECSC (1952–1955)
quote: Europe has never existed. It is not the addition of national sovereignties in a conclave. One must genuinely create Europe.

name: Robert Schuman
role: French Foreign Minister; Founding Father of the EU
quote: Europe will not be made all at once, or according to a single plan. It will be built through concrete achievements which first create a de facto solidarity.

name: Konrad Adenauer
role: Chancellor of West Germany; ECSC Founding Signatory
quote: We must strive for democratic integration of Europe. This is the condition for peace.

name: Jacques Delors
role: President, European Commission (1985–1995)
quote: You cannot fall in love with the single market. But you can fall in love with Europe.

name: Helmut Kohl
role: Chancellor of Germany; architect of German reunification and the euro
quote: European integration is a question of war and peace. In this sense the euro is a guarantee for peace.

name: François Mitterrand
role: President of France (1981–1995); co-architect of Maastricht Treaty
quote: France is our homeland, but Europe is our future.

name: Viktor Orbán
role: Prime Minister of Hungary (2010–present); leader of illiberal challenge to EU
quote: We do not want liberal democracy — we want Christian democracy.

name: Angela Merkel
role: Chancellor of Germany (2005–2021); dominant EU leader of her era
quote: We can do this. [Wir schaffen das.] — on the refugee crisis, 2015

name: Charles Michel
role: President, European Council (2019–2024)
quote: The EU must be a geopolitical power that acts with unity and determination.

name: Volodymyr Zelensky
role: President of Ukraine; EU candidate state leader
quote: Ukraine has proven it belongs in the European family. We want to prove we are worth it.

name: Maia Sandu
role: President of Moldova; EU candidate state leader
quote: Moldova's European future is the future our citizens chose — and we will deliver it.

name: Herman Van Rompuy
role: First permanent President, European Council (2009–2014)
quote: The era of the European nation-state is over — Europe is too small to be big and too big to be small.

name: Kaja Kallas
role: EU High Representative for Foreign Affairs & Security Policy (2024–present)
quote: There is no middle ground on Russian aggression. Europe must stand firm.

name: Simone Veil
role: First directly elected President of the European Parliament (1979–1982)
quote: Europe is not only a market, it is a political project of peace and human rights.

name: Emmanuel Macron
role: President of France (2017–present); leading EU sovereignty advocate
quote: Europe cannot remain a spectator while geopolitical power is redistributed. We must build European sovereignty.

name: Donald Tusk
role: President, European Council (2014–2019); President of Poland (2023–)
quote: Preserving the unity of the 27 in Brexit negotiations was the most important thing we did.
